name: BR20 LED Bulb – 550 Lumens
description: Features: Seamless Dimming: Offers 10%–100% dimming range to create the perfect ambiance for any space. Energy Saving: Uses only 7W of power, replacing 50W traditional bulbs and reducing energy consumption by up to 85%. Wide and Bright Illumination: Designed for 4″ recessed cans with a 110° flood beam, ideal for broad, even lighting. Certified for Safety and Performance: Energy Star, UL, FCC, and RoHS certified for quality assurance and safety. Long-Lasting Durability: Rated for 25,000 hours of use, damp location rated, and backed by a 5-year warranty for reliable performance.
short_desc: Product Attributes: Lumens: 550 LM Efficacy: 79 LM/W Wattage: 7W Wattage Equivalency: 50W Voltage: 120V Operating Temperature: 4°F – 104°F Dimmable: Yes Color Temperature: 2200K, 2700K, 3000K, 4000K, 5000K, 6000K CRI: 80+ Beam Angle: 110° Moisture Rating: Damp Rated Bulb Base: E26 Finish: Frosted Material: Aluminum, Polycarbonate Certifications: UL, Energy Star, FCC, RoHS Switching Cycles: 30,000 Lifetime: 25,000 Hours Warranty: 5-Year
